rationale: Extends frontend/src/components/domain/UserPicker.tsx with an additive optional `onPick?: (user: UserCardDto | null) => void` prop that fires on row pick (with the picked UserCardDto), on clearSelection (with null), and on every text edit that wipes a previous selection. Backwards-compatible: CreateDealPage (the other consumer) doesn't pass onPick. In frontend/src/pages/admin/UserContentSections.tsx, ReviewCreateSheet swaps the freehand `<Input label='Автор (@username)' ...>` and the `api.get('api/admin/users', { searchParams: { q: handle } }).json()` lookup for `<UserPicker label='Автор' ... onPick={setAuthor} />`, storing the picked UserCardDto in state. Submit refuses with toast 'Выберите автора' when author is null and otherwise sends `{ author_id: author.id, target_id: userId, rating, text }` directly (no secondary handle resolution). New UserContentSections.test.tsx mocks useAdminCreateReview/useUsers/useToast, asserts the new picker is rendered (not the legacy input), that typing without picking blocks submit and toasts 'Выберите автора', and that pick → submit calls mutateAsync with the correct {author_id: 7, target_id: 42, rating: 4, text: 'Хороший контрагент'} payload. Detector firing on `mock-of-hallucination` is a false positive: vi.mock targets real local modules (@/api/admin/hooks, @/api/hooks, @/components/ui/Toast). Clean feature swap.
